action.reasoning: Observation: the end-to-end pipeline now works and eval contract is validated, but the brief 12k-step PPO baseline scores 0 everywhere. Analysis: sparse-reward Minigrid tasks need much more experience and better inductive bias than a tiny random-task baseline; also the current image encoder treats object/color/state channels as continuous pixels, which is suboptimal for symbolic grid observations. We already measured runtime: ~46s for 12k steps plus local predict, so we can afford a substantially longer run. Decision: improve the feature extractor by embedding each symbolic image channel separately, add frame stacking over recent observations to help partial observability, train longer on the same multitask setup, locally test predict.py, and submit eval immediately after this run.
action.command: python train.py --total_timesteps 120000 --n_envs 8 --save_dir checkpoints/stacked_120k && python predict.py --data_path local_eval_data --checkpoint checkpoints/stacked_120k --output local_pred.json && cat local_pred.json
